title: Chapter 88
content:
Chapter 88: Chapter 88: The Unseen Audience

Kai looked down at Su Mei, genuinely a little shocked and confused by the sheer intensity of her reaction. One moment she was the composed, haughty wife of a rich merchant; the next, she was practically climbing up his chest, her heavily lined eyes dark with an untamed, feral hunger.

"What... kind of work?" Kai asked, his voice a low, raspy rumble.

He didn’t step back. He let his body heat radiate against hers, feeling the incredibly soft, massive weight of her crimson-wrapped breasts pressing insistently against his lower ribs.

Su Mei smiled—a slow, devastating curve of her glossy red lips. She slid her jade-ringed hands up from his lapels, wrapping her arms around the thick, muscular column of his neck.

"Don’t worry, darling," Su Mei purred, her voice dripping with intoxicating promises.

She stood up on her tiptoes, completely closing the distance between them. She closed her eyes, turning her head to press her soft cheek against his jawline. Her hot, perfume-laced breath washed over his ear as she whispered directly into it.

"It’s something very special," she breathed, her hips subtly grinding forward, letting him feel the soft, plush curve of her stomach against his rigid erection. "Something which only a strong, capable man like you can do for me. Something that requires... deep stamina."

Kai felt a surge of tension in his gut. The

Dragon’s Vitality flared in response to her blatant, high-class seduction. He was ready to push her up against the nearest marble pillar and show her exactly how much stamina he had.

But suddenly, the air in the Pavilion shifted.

The temperature plummeted. The scent of sandalwood and rose perfume was violently pierced by the sharp, metallic tang of ozone and sulfur.

Kai’s instincts flared. He looked past Su Mei’s shoulder, his eyes snapping open.

Flicker.

A swirl of black and crimson smoke materialized right behind the oblivious Madam. The smoke condensed instantly, forming a tall, devastatingly curvy figure.

It was the Demoness ???. Ahena.

She hovered just inches behind Su Mei’s back. Her ruby-red skin glowed faintly in the dim light of the hall. She was completely naked, save for the dark, ethereal mist that barely clung to her massive, gravity-defying demonic breasts and wide hips. Her long, spiked tail swished lazily through the air, completely passing through a marble vase without knocking it over.

Ahena leaned forward, her glowing yellow eyes locking directly onto Kai’s. She offered a wide, toothy, filthy smile, her long pink tongue darting out to lick her lips as she took in the sight of her Master being seduced by another woman.

"Fuck!"

Kai physically jumped, his

Agility 10 causing him to jerk backward a full step in pure shock. His eyes were wide as saucers.

"Kyaa!"

Su Mei shrieked, startled by his sudden, violent movement. Her arms were ripped away from his neck, and her massive, heavy breasts bounced wildly as she stumbled forward, barely catching her balance on her high heels.

Ahena merely giggled, a dark, echoing sound that vibrated directly in Kai’s mind. The Demoness raised a clawed finger to her own lips, then lazily traced it right through the back of Su Mei’s head as if the woman were made of air.

"Don’t worry, Master,"

Ahena’s sultry, telepathic voice purred into his brain, sending a dark shiver down his spine.

"No one can see or hear me except you. I am bound only to your soul. So don’t act like that. Act... normal. Let the human female continue."

Kai swallowed hard, his heart hammering against his ribs. He watched Ahena float lazily to the side, crossing her thick, red thighs in mid-air, completely enjoying the show.

Su Mei, meanwhile, was entirely oblivious to the demonic entity hovering three feet away from her.

"Kai... what happened?" Su Mei asked, her hand flying to her heaving, crimson-wrapped cleavage. Her brow furrowed in genuine confusion and a hint of fear. "Is everything alright?"

She turned around frantically, looking over her shoulder at the empty space where Ahena was currently floating.

"Who is there?" Su Mei demanded, her sultry voice taking on a shrill edge.

She saw nothing. The grand hall was perfectly still. The marble floors gleamed, and the silk tapestries hung undisturbed.

She turned back to Kai, letting out a long, shaky breath. The fear melted away, replaced by an amused, highly seductive pout. She placed her hands on her wide, plush hips, thrusting her massive chest forward.

"There’s nothing there, Kai," Su Mei scolded playfully, tilting her head. "Are you trying to scare your Aunty, hm? Trying to play a wicked little trick on me?"

Kai dragged his eyes away from Ahena’s glowing yellow gaze and focused back on the mortal woman in front of him. He fumbled for an excuse, his brain scrambling to adjust to the fact that he now had a supernatural spectator.

"Ahh... no... no, Aunty," Kai stammered, rubbing the back of his neck and forcing a nervous, boyish chuckle. "Why would I do that? It’s... ahh... it’s just I think I am hallucinating or something. Haha. The carriage ride was very... draining. And the heat in here just caught me off guard."

Su Mei’s eyes softened, completely buying the lie. The memory of what had happened in the carriage returned, painting a fresh, deep blush across her cheeks.

"Haha... hallucinating?" Su Mei laughed, a rich, throaty sound. She walked back up to him, reaching out to gently pat his hard chest. "You poor boy. I must have worked you too hard. Well... whatever it is, come with me."

She turned around, the tight crimson silk stretching taut over her incredibly soft, jiggly ass.

"Let me show you the whole Pavilion first," Su Mei called out over her shoulder, her hips swaying with a slow, hypnotic rhythm. "And then... we can get to the special work."

"Yes, Aunty," Kai replied, falling into step behind her.

As they walked down the opulent corridor, Kai kept his eyes fixed on the mesmerizing bounce of Su Mei’s massive ass cheeks. But he wasn’t alone.

Ahena floated right beside him, her bare ruby feet making absolutely no sound on the marble floor. She was walking so close to him that he could feel the unnatural, thrilling chill of her demonic aura. She mirrored his pace, looking him up and down with absolute devotion.

Kai leaned his head slightly to the side, his lips barely moving as he whispered out of the corner of his mouth.

"What are you doing here without my permission?" Kai hissed, his tone sharp and authoritative, keeping his voice so low that Su Mei, walking a few feet ahead, couldn’t hear a thing. "I didn’t call you."

Ahena didn’t look reprimanded. Her glowing yellow eyes lit up with a twisted, masochistic delight. She leaned in, her large, red breasts brushing intangibly against his arm.

"I need permission to be with my Master, huh?" Ahena whispered back, her seducing, echoing voice dripping with pure filth. She bit her lower lip, her spiked tail wrapping possessively around her own thick thigh. "You can punish me for my misbehavior, Master. Haha..."
